attributes.relationship: [{"src": "BDSP_SPCP.T80_PC8_CPS_PBK.PARTY_ID", "rel_type": "join", "expression": "BDSP_SPCP.T80_PC8_CPS_PBK.PARTY_ID = BDSP_SPCP.T80_PC8_CPS_ASSET_AVG_Y.CUST_ID", "target_column": ["BDSP_SPCP.T80_PC8_CPS_ASSET_AVG_Y.CUST_ID"], "rel_evidence": "私人银行客户表通过PARTY_ID与资产表CUST_ID关联"}]
